# Transcrição: 1. Purpose of the Program

- **Fonte:** 1. Purpose of the Program
- **Duração:** 03:05
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 03:00]

Hey, the goal of this program is that you will become a master, a master at the art of negotiating and closing any transaction anytime with any person. These lessons will provide you with information that you are missing on this very critical skill so that you can get what you want in life, in your career, and when you're out there selling. You know, most sales people consider themselves successful if they close 20%. We're going to get you in a place where you have a skill set so powerful that you can easily, easily exceed that. This one skill called the close separates those who have from those who don't have. Those who don't learn this skill of closing can never have abundance in their life. The close is where a person, or you, are able to actually get rewarded for that previous hard work that you did with a client, whether it was an hour and a half, four hours, four months, or four years. Life is about negotiating, and these segments will show you how not just to negotiate, but how to get your way in the boardroom, at the negotiating table, and even at home. Closing is that final step in the pursuit of any goal. This thing called closing is not just something sales people do, but something that applies to every person. Nothing truly happens. Nothing truly happens until you are able to engender the support, energy, and resources of other people. As harsh as it may seem, the close, this thing called the close, is what separates those who have from those who don't have. This critically and vital ability is what differentiates the dreamer from the exceptional individual that makes dreams come true. You know the world is abundant with grand ideas and big dreams. It's short on people who can close others on funding those dreams, getting the support of those dreams, and getting others behind them to make those dreams a reality. The skill and ability to close, a deal, a transaction, to get support is that one skill in life that you definitely must possess and control as it is needed by every human being. It determines how well you'll do in getting your way at the negotiating table and in business. You think this is an overstatement, but the truth is you only know the names of people like Christopher Columbus, Ben Franklin, Abraham Lincoln, Thomas Edison, Henry Ford, John Kennedy, Martin Luther King, Walt Disney, Mother Teresa, Bill Gates, Steve Jobs, Colonel Sanders, Oprah Winfrey, and Barack Obama. You only know these people because they were able to close others on their ideas. They were able to instill support from others so that they could get their ideas back with money, energy, support, and effort. The art of closing is not confined to salespeople. It is a needed skill of anyone that wants to make their ideas, their dreams, their products, and services and push those things into the marketplace. In each of these segments, I will want you to consider just how you can use these in your business or in your personal life, how you can use these in life.

## [03:00 - 03:05]

So let's get started with making you a master at the art of the close.
